inputs.label: Sale Price
inputs.businessContext: The final agreed sale price of the property.

businessContext_i18n.en: The final agreed sale price of the property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente final convenu du bien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta final acordado de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Total Commission Rate
inputs.businessContext: The combined commission percentage for both buyer and seller agents.

businessContext_i18n.en: The combined commission percentage for both buyer and seller agents.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hem alıcı hem de satıcı acenteleri için birleşik komisyon yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der kombinierte Provisionsprozentsatz für Makler von Käufer und Verkäufer
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de commission combiné pour les agents acheteur et vendeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje de comisión combinado para los agentes del comprador y del vendedor.

inputs.label: Buyer Agent Split
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of the total commission that goes to the buyer's agent.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of the total commission that goes to the buyer's agent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam komisyonun alıcı acentesine giden yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Prozentsatz der Gesamtprovision, der an den Makler des Käufers geht
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la commission totale revenant à l'agent de l'acheteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje de la comisión total que corresponde al agente del comprador.

inputs.label: Additional Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Any additional fixed fees (e.g., administrative charges) beyond the commission.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any additional fixed fees (e.g., administrative charges) beyond the commission.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Komisyon dışındaki ek sabit ücretler (ör. idari masraflar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche feste Gebühren (z. B. Verwaltungskosten) über die Provision hinaus
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes supplémentaires éventuels (ex. frais administratifs) au-delà de la commission.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier tarifa fija adicional (por ejemplo, cargos administrativos) más allá de la comisión.

inputs.label: VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: The Value Added Tax rate applied to the commission, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: The Value Added Tax rate applied to the commission, if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Komisyona uygulanan Katma Değer Vergisi oranı (varsa).
businessContext_i18n.de: Mehrwertsteuersatz, der auf die Provision angewendet wird, falls zutreffend
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe sur la valeur ajoutée appliqué à la commission, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de IVA aplicada a la comisión, si corresponde.

inputs.label: VAT Applicable
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether VAT is applied (1 = yes, 0 = no).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether VAT is applied (1 = yes, 0 = no).
businessContext_i18n.tr: KDV'nin uygulanıp uygulanmadığını belirtir (1 = evet, 0 = hayır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob Mehrwertsteuer angewendet wird (1 = ja, 0 = nein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si la TVA est appliquée (1 = oui, 0 = non).
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si se aplica IVA (1 = sí, 0 = no).
